title: Ways to find an existing business number - Canada.ca
content:
## Ways to find an existing business number
You need to provide your existing business number (BN) if you are adding CRA program accounts using Business Registration Online (BRO).
You should have received a BN if you registered with the CRA, incorporated federally, or if you registered or incorporated with certain provinces. A BN may have also been created for your business if you started a registration with BRO but your session timed out or ended unexpectedly.
Try the options below to help you find your BN.
- Check your records The easiest way to find your BN is to look through your own records: Letters or notices you received for your business Confirmation details you may have saved or printed at the end of a registration session (for example, BRO session with the CRA)
The easiest way to find your BN is to look through your own records:
- Letters or notices you received for your business
- Confirmation details you may have saved or printed at the end of a registration session (for example, BRO session with the CRA)
- Sign in to your account If you already added My Business Account to your CRA account, you can find your BN on the Welcome page when you sign in to your CRA account . If you registered through your province or territory, you may also be able to find your BN by signing in to your provincial or territorial online account or portal.

## Sign in to your account
If you already added My Business Account to your CRA account, you can find your BN on the Welcome page when you sign in to your CRA account .
If you registered through your province or territory, you may also be able to find your BN by signing in to your provincial or territorial online account or portal.
- Check online business registries You can search for your BN using online business registries, including the following: Corporations Canada For federally incorporated businesses. Corporations Canada Ontario Business Registry (OBR) For Ontario businesses and not-for-profit organizations. Information may be available 2 business days after registration. Fees may apply for certain services. Ontario Business Registry (OBR) Canada's Business Registries For federal corporations, and corporations and limited partnerships in certain provinces. Canada's Business Registries

## Check online business registries
You can search for your BN using online business registries, including the following:
For federally incorporated businesses.
Ontario Business Registry (OBR)
For Ontario businesses and not-for-profit organizations. Information may be available 2 business days after registration.
Fees may apply for certain services.
Ontario Business Registry (OBR)
Canada's Business Registries
For federal corporations, and corporations and limited partnerships in certain provinces.
Canada's Business Registries
- Contact the CRA If you still can't find your BN, you need to speak to a CRA agent to resolve any issues or complete your registration. For Canadian residents When you call, you may need to provide information you entered during registration to ensure it matches what the CRA has on file. Telephone numbers Canada or United States: 1-800-959-5525 (opens up phone application) 1-800-959-5525 Yukon, Northwest Territories and Nunavut: 1-866-841-1876 (opens up phone application) 1-866-841-1876 Teletypewriter (TTY) or Canada VRS Teletypewriter (TTY): 1-800-665-0354 (opens up phone application) 1-800-665-0354 Canada VRS (Video Relay Service): Register with Canada VRS to download the app and call the VRS line Hours Business accounts – Hours of service Date Hours Monday to Friday 8 am to 8 pm ET Saturday and Sunday Closed Closed on public holidays For non-residents of Canada To speak with a CRA agent about an issue with your BN, complete the online form "Contact a non-resident specialist" to request a callback from a tax specialist .
If you still can't find your BN, you need to speak to a CRA agent to resolve any issues or complete your registration.
When you call, you may need to provide information you entered during registration to ensure it matches what the CRA has on file.
Closed on public holidays
To speak with a CRA agent about an issue with your BN, complete the online form "Contact a non-resident specialist" to request a callback from a tax specialist .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
